claim: EigenPacket is the primary telemetry contract and now carries typed spectral shape fields, not only scalar magnitudes.
The top-k eigenvector field can create serialization/payload pressure and needs bounded review evidence.
authority: read-only payload budget review; no websocket cadence or eigenvector export change

claim: spectral_fingerprint_v1 should map to SpectralFingerprintV1 and serialize alongside legacy spectral_fingerprint.
Warm-start blend sensitivity is live damping/recovery behavior and should not be changed from introspection alone.
authority: Tier 5 damping/recovery wait; review packet only, no live recovery retune

claim: semantic_stale_shape influences timing windows and should be tested before any cadence or stale-window retune.
authority: targeted sensory-bus verification; no cadence or stale-window change
